title: Raids:Enhanced
body:
**Raids:Enhanced** adds several mini bosses to minecraft raids. Each mini-boss is unique in its own way and require different strategy to fight against in face-to-face combat.

# Raider Blimp ## Required Raid Omen level: 5 Raider Blimp is an airborne assault unit built by illagers to effectively eliminate their targets from above. This beast is capable of targeting 7 enemies at once: 3 from both sides and 1 right under the blimp. Use its blind spots! As a reward for beating the Raider Blimp you receive Blimp Parts which can be combined with any boat to make your own little blimp!

# Golem Of Last Resort ## Required Raid Omen level: 3 Golem Of Last Resort is an upgraded version of an iron golem. This unstoppable machinery has 3 AOE melee attacks and 1 AOE ranged attack, is immune to arrows and attacks from long distances, breaks nearby blocks like wither. Bring a shield to kill this one, but be careful, some of its melee attacks disable shields! As a reward for beating him you get a cannon from his back that allows to shoot bombs that deal damage in a big radius.

# Zapper ## Required Raid Omen level: 4 Zapper is a ranged attacker that uses the power of lightning. This guy has 2 special attacks: one is a powerful AOE attack that needs to be dodged, and second one will burn away your shield in seconds. Make sure to have some spare blocks in your inventory! As a reward for beating the Zapper you get his staff, allowing you to launch ball lightnings and cast one of his special abilites when looking downward.

# Raider Drill ## Required Raid Omen level: 2 Raider Drill is a strategic illager unit that burrows underground and unburrows at random location in the village, summoning from 2 to 3 illagers (configurable) afterwards. Burrows again after 10 seconds (configurable) of inactivity, 5 times max (configurable). It has 5 HP, to deal damage to it you need to hit it 3 times, this will deal 1 damage to it, then raider drill burrows again. As a reward for destroying the raider drill you receive a random enchantment book for pickaxes.
